title: A Proof of the Nielsen-Ninomiya Theorem
canonical_scope: External source anchor for the rigorous spectral-projection and Chern-character route to the lattice Nielsen-Ninomiya theorem.

section_map.title: Main Result
section_map.summary: The lattice chiral index vanishes in each charge sector, and the proof is recast in the language of characteristic classes.

section_map.title: Charge-Sector Setup And Chiral Index
section_map.summary: The lattice Hamiltonian, smooth charge projections, isolated Fermi points, and the low-energy chiral index are defined for an arbitrary odd-dimensional lattice.

section_map.title: Spectral Projection And Chiral Current
section_map.summary: A charge-filtered spectral projection S(p) defines a conserved chiral current supported on the spectrum and determined locally by the spectral projector near each branch.

section_map.title: Localization Near A Generic Spectral Branch
section_map.summary: Near a generic eigenvalue branch, the chiral current reduces to a delta-function current built from the local spectral projector P_0 and its derivatives.

section_map.title: Chern Character And Cobordism Interpretation
section_map.summary: The low-energy chiral index is identified with the Chern number of the spectral bundle on the boundary of the punctured Brillouin zone, so cobordism invariance forces it to vanish.

equation_map.title: The chiral index as a boundary Chern number that must vanish
